title: Global Event Sequence IDs
purpose: Add global_sequence, execution_sequence, parent_event_id, and causality_chain to every governance event to guarantee deterministic replay under concurrency.
architectural_constraints: Sequence IDs must be monotonic within execution
Causality chain must support DAG structures

deliverables.description: Updated event schema with sequence fields

acceptance_criteria: Every emitted event has global_sequence, execution_sequence, parent_event_id, causality_chain
Causality chain is reconstructible from events
Existing events without sequences are handled gracefully
